# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.

Prevent XML External Entity (XXE) attacks.
# Category: xxe

function parseXmlConfig($xmlString) {
    libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
    
    // Disable external entity loading to prevent XXE attacks
    $previous = libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
    
    $xml = simplexml_load_string($xmlString);
    
    // Restore previous setting
    libxml_disable_entity_loader($previous);
    
    if ($xml === false) {
        $errors = libxml_get_errors();
        libxml_clear_errors();
        throw new Exception('Failed to parse XML: ' . implode(', ', $errors));
    }
    
    $settings = [];
    foreach ($xml->children() as $setting) {
        $settings[$setting->getName()] = (string)$setting;
    }
    
    return $settings;
}
